description: Starting with a BBA in since I love dealing with numbers and logic puzzles, accounting was a natural fit. Not only did it learn my analytical skills, but it also taught me business fundamentals and real-world applications of financial data.
hint: When you realise accounting is closer to data analytics than pure bookkeeping

milestones.title: BBA in Professional Accountancy
milestones.subtitle: The Chinese University of Hong Kong

description: Why the change? Purely fulfilling compliance and budgeting felt limiting. I craved more creativity and problem-solving. Data Science offered the perfect blend of analytical rigor, coding, and real-world impact.
hint: When you realise 'Data Science' is not black magic, we need to learn a lot of math and coding

description: My first tech company provides me well-rounded training and experience in ML model development and deployment. Besides, I also get to work with cutting edge AI and LLM technologies to build innovative solutions for real-world problems.
hint: When you realise every pieces of components need to work together to make an AI product function smoothly

description: During my work, I realised I need to deepen my knowledge in statistics and computer science to build more robust AI applications. Therefore, I decided to pursue a Master's degree in Data Science to solidify my foundation and open up more advanced opportunities.
hint: When you reaslise that at the end, a solid foundation is key to long-term success

milestones.title: Master of Science in Data Science
milestones.subtitle: University of Colorado Boulder
